# Vision Fixture Attribution

## Desk_chair.jpg

- Description: Office chair that can swivel and be adjusted to various heights
  and angles.
- Author: Emiellaiendiay at English Wikipedia.
- Original upload date: November 22, 2006.

This fixture contains no private document or project-user photograph. It is
committed only for reproducible automated evaluation and is copied into the
test bundle, never the shipping application bundle.
